subcodes.first_line: Lauded and glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! Thou art supreme over the realm of being and Thy power pervadeth all created things.
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انک انت القادر على الامکان والمقتدر على الاکوان فی قبضتک ملکوت الانشاء تخلق کیف تشاء
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Greatest Name, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
